summary: Completed testing of Menu FAB button configuration feature. Backend API correctly returns showMenuFab field with proper defaults. Frontend Menu FAB button is visible and functional on menu page when showMenuFab is true/default. Button works correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports.
passed_tests: Backend API returns showMenuFab field in config response
showMenuFab defaults to true when not set in database
Menu FAB button visible on menu page when showMenuFab is true/default
Menu FAB button is clickable and opens menu panel correctly
Menu FAB button is responsive and works on mobile viewport
Menu FAB button positioned correctly (bottom right corner)
Menu panel opens with category navigation when FAB is clicked

success_percentage.backend: 75% (3/4 tests passed - admin login failed due to authentication)

action_item_for_main_agent: Admin settings testing could not be completed due to authentication requirements. The 'Menu Button (FAB)' toggle exists in VisibilityTab.jsx code but requires valid admin credentials to test the toggle functionality in the UI. All other aspects of the Menu FAB configuration feature are working correctly.
